title: Add proof-of-API integration test for ferrolearn-tree
description:
Final step of #243. tests/api_proof.rs exercising every public API of ferrolearn-tree end-to-end:
- DecisionTreeClassifier / Regressor: every builder, fit, predict, predict_proba (cls), predict_log_proba (cls), score, feature_importances_
- ExtraTreeClassifier / Regressor: same
- RandomForestClassifier / Regressor: same plus parallel-fit smoke
- ExtraTreesClassifier / Regressor: same
- GradientBoostingClassifier / Regressor: same plus decision_function (cls)
- HistGradientBoostingClassifier / Regressor: same plus decision_function (cls)
- AdaBoostClassifier / AdaBoostRegressor: same plus decision_function (cls)
- BaggingClassifier / Regressor (after wiring)
- VotingClassifier / Regressor (both hard and soft voting)
- IsolationForest: fit, predict, score_samples
- RandomTreesEmbedding: fit, transform
- All enum variants (ClassificationCriterion, RegressionCriterion, MaxFeatures, AdaBoostAlgorithm, AdaBoostLoss, etc.)

Defer to existing issues: warm_start/oob (#53), sample_weight (#54), export_graphviz/text (#55), pruning ctor params (#48-52), Stacking (#41/#42), staged_* (filed above), apply/decision_path (filed above).
